raw_text: Hi, yes Tuesday works great — could we say 2pm? I've had a look at the notes you sent over and the booking thing is definitely the biggest issue for us, we lose people all the time because there's no way to book online. See you Tuesday. Claire

Thanks for the info. The pricing looks reasonable. Quick question — would the SSL fix and mobile sort be a separate job or could you do it as part of a wider redesign? We're thinking we might as well sort the whole thing in one go if we're doing it. Rob

Hi — you're right actually, we don't have a quote form and I've been meaning to sort that for ages. Customers do ask and we just tell them to ring. If it's a quick job then yes, I'd be interested to hear more. What would something like that cost? Tom
Thanks for getting in touch but we're happy with how things are at the moment and not looking to make any changes to the website. Best wishes
Thanks for your email. I'm out of the office until Monday 6th April. I'll pick up emails on my return. Best, David Harewood
